message:
chore(release): bump tru to 0.2.2 and move async-stream to asupersync 0.2.9

Release the next patch version so crates.io reflects the current optional
async-stream runtime and aligns the packaged dependency graph with the latest
published asupersync release.

- bump the package version from 0.2.1 to 0.2.2 so the next crates.io publish
  is distinct from the current public release
- update the optional asupersync dependency from 0.2.5 to 0.2.9 while keeping
  the `async-stream` feature gate unchanged
- refresh Cargo.lock so the published artifact matches the current registry
  graph, including the franken-* companions and newly pulled transitive runtime
  crates from asupersync 0.2.9
- preserve the existing crate surface and release metadata while moving the
  optional async path onto the current runtime series

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
